## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix:` bug fix
- [ ] `feat:` new feature
- [ ] `feat!:` / `BREAKING CHANGE:` breaking change
- [ ] `docs:` / `chore:` / `refactor:` / `test:` / `perf:` non-shipping

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Smoke-tested against an MCP client (Claude Desktop or `@modelcontextprotocol/inspector`) for behavior changes
- [ ] No access tokens, secrets, or internal hostnames in the diff
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
